hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *.java ]]; then echo "[hook] Java file edited: $file — run mvn compile to verify"; elif [[ "$file" == *.dart ]]; then echo "[hook] Dart file edited: $file — run flutter analyze to verify"; elif [[ "$file" == *.ts ]]; then echo "[hook] TS file edited: $file — check auth-service, avoid editing if not needed"; fi
file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *auth-service* ]]; then echo "WARNING: Attempting to edit auth-service. This service should NOT be modified unless explicitly requested."; fi
